name: The Japanese Calligraphy
short_description: A Japanese Calligraphy Simulator Game! Not only can you practice writing with a brush following examples, but you can also practice writing hiragana and katakana! Self-scoring kanji tests! Grateful sutra copying! Let's study Japanese!
detailed_description:
Live Streaming and Gameplay Welcome!!

**[Calligraphy Simulator Game]**

Write characters on Japanese calligraphy paper using a brush.

Enjoy the art of calligraphy on your computer!

Fully reproduce the brush techniques like *tome*, *hane*, and *harai*!

**[Hiragana & Katakana]**

Learn how to write hiragana and katakana by tracing the 50-syllable charts.

**[Calligraphy Practice]**

Practice calligraphy following examples and get used to brush movements.

There are various examples, including single characters, two characters, four-character idioms, and large-format paper.

**[Sutra Copying]**

Handwrite the *Heart Sutra* and engrave its sacred words into your heart.

It could also be used as a form of atonement, like waterfall meditation.

**[Kanji Test]**

Test yourself on the kanji learned in elementary school.

Self-score and check whether you got them right!

**[Free Mode]**

In different settings, feel free to write anything with a brush.
